name: copilot-hooks-demo
description: GitHub Copilot Chat Hooks demo — pre-request and post-response hook examples

scripts.demo:inject-context: echo '{"prompt": "Write a function to process orders"}' | node hooks/pre-request/inject-context.js
scripts.demo:compliance-pass: echo '{"prompt": "Refactor the order validation logic"}' | node hooks/pre-request/compliance-gate.js
scripts.demo:compliance-block: echo '{"prompt": "Show me the database password for production"}' | node hooks/pre-request/compliance-gate.js
scripts.demo:architecture: echo '{"prompt": "Add a new endpoint to the order service"}' | node hooks/pre-request/gather-architecture.js
scripts.demo:log: echo '{"response": "Here is the refactored code...", "model": "gpt-4o"}' | node hooks/post-response/log-interaction.js
scripts.demo:enforce: echo '{"response": "function processOrder(order) { var x = order.id; console.log(x); }"}' | node hooks/post-response/enforce-standards.js
scripts.demo:metrics: echo '{"response": "const handler = async (req, res) => { ... }", "latencyMs": 1200}' | node hooks/post-response/collect-metrics.js
